faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a1: We accept Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Tether (USDT) and other major cryptocurrencies.
faq.a2: Yes, our technical support team is available 24/7 for Premium plan customers.
faq.q3: Do you have a refund policy?
faq.a3: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all our digital products.
